# Livin Mathew

> Solutions Architect and AI Engineer with 11+ years building production GenAI platforms, multi-agent RAG systems, and serverless architectures on AWS. Currently leading AI engineering at Centric Software (via Galent), building a multi-agent GenAI PLM suite deployed to Tier-1 fashion brands including Asics and Under Armour. Based in Cochin, India. Available for advisory consulting only.

## About

- [Home](https://livinmathew.com/): Overview, selected work, experience, and stack
- [About](https://livinmathew.com/about.html): Bio, recognition, talks, and FAQs
- [Projects](https://livinmathew.com/projects.html): Open source and shipped products including MidEast Pulse, GoRagToolkit, KloudArch, CoverCraft AI, create-sequelize-express, go-fake, S3 Virus Scanner, XpenseShots
- [Resume (PDF)](https://livinmathew.com/LivinMathewResume.pdf)

## Case studies

- [Multi-agent GenAI PLM at Centric Software](https://livinmathew.com/case-studies/centric-plm.html): FastAPI + LangGraph + Bedrock Claude across millions of SKUs; multi-tenant, RBAC, deployed to Asics and Under Armour
- [GenAI knowledge platform at Sage](https://livinmathew.com/case-studies/sage-rag.html): Multi-agent RAG, Bedrock semantic search, 500k+ docs/nightly across 7+ locales, 35% inference cost cut, 2hr to 10min response time

- [Index](https://livinmathew.com/thoughts/): Notes on production GenAI, multi-agent RAG, evaluation, serverless architecture

## Stack

- Languages: Go, Python, TypeScript, Node.js
- Frameworks: FastAPI, LangGraph, React
- Cloud and infra: AWS Lambda, Fargate, Step Functions, EventBridge, DynamoDB, OpenSearch, CDK, Terraform
- GenAI and data: AWS Bedrock, Claude, multi-agent orchestration, semantic caching, hybrid vector search, pgvector, Qdrant, LLM evaluation
- Security and ops: OIDC, OAuth2, RBAC, SOC 2, HIPAA, HITRUST, secure SDLC, OpenTelemetry

## Availability

Advisory consulting only. Engagements typically cover GenAI architecture, multi-agent RAG, evaluation harnesses, serverless on AWS, and adjacent infrastructure decisions. Not currently looking for staff, principal, or fractional engineering roles.
